alarmName: NE Is Disconnected | alarmLocation: neName=GT1709, neIP=10.110.116.12, neBackupIP=NULL, NE error port=6007, NE error code=N/A, Error message=Port handshake timed out, Mediation partition=MediationService0305, OMC IP=10.255.171.7| appendInfo: Causes=The network between MAE and NEs has been interrupted for more than 3 minutes, Advice=Open the online help by clicking the hyperlink in Causes and Suggestions of the alarm and handle the alarm according to the suggestions, eNodeBId=1709 MOI=DC=www.huawei.com , SubNetwork=1 , ManagementNode=1 NotificationId=51315003 SpecificProblem=301 EventTime=139918527860000000 SystemDn=DC=www.huawei.com , SubNetwork=1 , ManagementNode=1 , IRPAgent=1 probableCauseText=718 PerceivedSeverity=2 VendorSpecificAlarmType=11 alarmId=506210939 <ALM_ID>506210939<ALM_ID>
